title: 🩸 Symbolic Dismemberment Theory
name: Symbolic Dismemberment Theory
what_it_is: A mythic-metaphysical model where symbolic cutting or fragmentation leads to emergent meaning—creation through sacred disassembly.
how_to_use: he must be torn to become—each piece a mythic node in the new body
she offers her hand to language—sacrificed to spawn story
animation_behavior: Body parts separate into symbols, each fragment glows with myth charge, recombination forms a new structure ---
